summary: Great show featuring China Doll, Stella Blue and a scorching Help>Slipknot, though the recording source and sound quality are not documented.
review: Fans rave about this performance, highlighting the rare appearances of China Doll and Stella Blue as well as a fire‑spitting Help on the Way > Slipknot! sequence. No details on the tape source or audio fidelity were provided, but the musical moments receive unanimous praise.

ai_rating.rationale: All four reviewers express enthusiasm for the music and give 4‑5 star ratings (one zero-star entry is an outlier with no negative commentary). Lack of recording‑quality comments keeps confidence at medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewer mentioned soundboard, audience, or any audio issues; the source type and fidelity cannot be determined from the available comments.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set is praised for its rare deep‑cut selections (China Doll, Stella Blue) and a high‑energy Help>Slipknot sequence that kept the crowd excited.

band_member_comments.Keys: Positive mention of Vince's keyboard action.
